examples: Roman builders perfected the semicircular arch made of separate blocks of stone.
SCDS can occur when some part of the bone protecting the superior semicircular canal is missing.
Located within the labyrinth are three semicircular canals that act as angular accelerometers for the head.
Several people hunched over seafood and beers around the semicircular bar, and only a few tables upstairs were occupied.
